name: Aswadh Pet Dog Cooling Mat to Help Your Pet Stay Cool in Summer for Home Travel S
description: Description:Pet Cooling Mat is perfect for keeping your pet cool and comfortable on hot days.Can be easily placed in your pet's favorite bed, no need to freeze or chill,no water,no electricity.Non-Toxic, latex-free material is safe for animals, adults and kids.Offers extra comfort for pets with joint pain.Lightweight and portable, for indoor and outdoor use.Specification:Material: Oxford ClothS: Approx.40x32cm/15.75x12.60inchM: Approx.39x50cm/15.35x19.68inchColor: BluePackage Includes:1 Piece Pet Cooling MatNote:Please chose the size properly before ordering.
